decisions.rationale: Matches core intent: account locked and asks support to download NID on the user’s behalf.
Account locked, addresses “আপনারা,” and asks for immediate download service; direct agent action.
Asks to unlock the locked account immediately; direct service request.
Profile is locked and asks support to unlock urgently now; direct support action.
Locked ID portal and asks “আপনি” to download for the user; direct on-behalf service request.
Locked account and asks for immediate unlock; matches the central intent.
Locked account and asks to get the download done immediately; direct service action.
Asks the agent to download NID for the user after opening/unlocking; direct assistance request.
Blocked profile and asks support to unblock instantly; direct service request.
Locked own account and asks immediate unlock; matches a central example.
Despite terse wording, it asks the agent to unlock the locked account now; direct request.
Asks whether the user can submit a request, not asking support to unlock or download now.
Mixed question about what will happen, self-opening, and someone downloading; not a clear direct support request.
Asks for a quick way or method, which is guidance/self-help rather than an unlock service request.
Account blocked and asks support to unblock very fast; direct service request.
Matches core example: locked NID online account and asks support to unlock now.
Asks for an immediate opportunity to have the blocked ID unlocked; service-oriented, not a how-to.
Profile locked and asks support to directly download for the user; clean on-behalf request.
Asks for the urgent unlock procedure; this is how-to guidance, not a direct service request.
Asks whether there is an unlock method or procedure, not support doing it now.
Asks what steps the user can take quickly, a self-action/how-to intent.
Asks broadly if anyone can download the NID, without a direct request to support or an agent.
Blocked NID service account and asks if it can be unlocked this moment; direct immediate unlock intent.
Login is closed and asks if someone can now download NID on the user’s behalf; direct on-behalf service request.

result.packet_rationale: Kept rows that directly ask support/agent to unlock or unblock a locked account/profile now/urgently, or download NID for/on behalf of the user. Flagged rows that instead ask for methods, self-action, submitting a request, or broad feasibility without a clear direct agent action.
